title: spilas #4694
definition:
1) a rock in the sea, ledge, reef
 2) metaph.  of men who by their conduct damage others morally, wreck
    them as it were
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a rock in the sea, ledge, reef
 2) metaph.  of men who by their conduct damage others morally, wreck
    them as it were

    NASB:  a ledge of rock (over which the sea dashes), i.e. a reef:
